response: Imagine you have a brand-new yellow US plug. You need to insert it into one of three available wall sockets: a round-pin socket, a flat-pin socket, or a three-pin socket. Which one should you choose?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a brand-new yellow US plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
